prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia renovates a clean personal blog house. The house has simple Hexo/Fluid-style panels, category shelves, comment window, and search sign. She holds a red screwdriver and a notebook labeled "博客事记".

Core meaning: a personal blog is being built, adjusted, indexed, and slowly filled with writing.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, white space, black/red/white, small blue web UI glow. Minimal labels: "博客事记", "简洁", "记录".

Avoid busy website screenshot, avoid marketing landing page, avoid giant title text.
